notes: HAR-745 validation-only capture for backupRegionUpdate: well-formed unknown CountryCode ZZ returns MarketUserError REGION_NOT_FOUND, while missing, null, and non-enum literal region.countryCode fail GraphQL input-object coercion before resolver execution.

errors.message: Argument 'countryCode' on InputObject 'BackupRegionUpdateInput' is required. Expected type CountryCode!

Argument 'countryCode' on InputObject 'BackupRegionUpdateInput' has an invalid value (42). Expected type 'CountryCode!'.
